title: Log in via OTP and reach dashboard with bottom navigation
description: This test verifies that a user can complete the mocked OTP login flow and lands on the dashboard with bottom navigation available.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill 9999999999 into the mobile number field
Click the action to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP input
Submit the OTP verification
Wait for the verification spinner to finish
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify bottom navigation is visible

title: First-time OTP login reaches dashboard with Bottom Navigation
description: Verifies a first-time user can move from splash to mocked OTP login and reach the authenticated dashboard with persistent bottom navigation visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the splash animation to complete
Click the splash call-to-action to proceed to login
Fill 9876543210 into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify bottom navigation is visible

title: Switch between authenticated tabs using Bottom Navigation
description: Verifies a logged-in citizen can use the Bottom Navigation to switch between core authenticated pages and see each destination page render.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the Home tab in the bottom navigation
Click the Services tab in the bottom navigation
Click the Complaints tab in the bottom navigation
Click the Notifications tab in the bottom navigation
Click the Profile tab in the bottom navigation
Verify the user lands on the profile page

title: Auth protection blocks direct access to property tax when logged out
description: Verifies direct navigation to the property tax route while logged out is blocked by redirecting to the login experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /property-tax
Verify the user is blocked from accessing the authenticated page
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Bottom Navigation is visible on the dashboard after login
description: Verifies that after completing OTP login the dashboard loads and the Bottom Navigation is present for continued navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify the bottom navigation is displayed

title: Property tax payment completes with receipt confirmation
description: Verifies an authenticated citizen can search by property ID, review details, complete the mocked payment, and see a success confirmation with a receipt reference.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the bottom navigation item for property tax
Fill a valid property ID into the property ID field
Submit the property search
Initiate payment
Wait for the processing state to complete
Verify a payment success confirmation is visible
Verify a receipt number is displayed

title: Bottom Navigation destinations remain accessible across a page refresh
description: Verifies that after logging in, refreshing an authenticated page preserves access to Bottom Navigation and navigation still works.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the Notifications tab in the bottom navigation
Navigate to /notifications
Click the Profile tab in the bottom navigation
Verify the user lands on the profile page
Verify the bottom navigation is displayed

title: Navigate to Property Tax and Complaints via dashboard quick services
description: This test verifies that quick service shortcuts on the dashboard take the user to Property Tax and then to Complaints within the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Click the action to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP input
Submit the OTP verification
Wait for the verification spinner to finish
Click the quick service for property tax
Click the back navigation control
Click the quick service for complaints registration
Verify the complaints page is displayed

title: Bottom Navigation highlights the active destination when switching tabs
description: Verifies that switching tabs updates the active state so the currently selected destination is clearly indicated to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the Services tab in the bottom navigation
Verify the Services tab is shown as the active tab
Click the Complaints tab in the bottom navigation
Verify the Complaints tab is shown as the active tab

title: Bottom navigation returns to dashboard after completing property tax receipt
description: Verifies the user can complete the property tax flow through receipt and return to the dashboard using bottom navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the bottom navigation item for property tax
Fill a valid property ID into the property ID field
Submit the property search
Initiate payment
Wait for the processing state to complete
Click the bottom navigation item for home
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify the dashboard quick services are displayed

title: Bottom navigation switches between notifications and profile and returns reliably
description: Verifies an authenticated user can switch between notifications and profile using bottom navigation and both pages render correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the bottom navigation item for notifications
Click the bottom navigation item for profile
Click the bottom navigation item for notifications
Verify the notifications list is displayed
Verify the profile page can be reached and renders basic profile information

title: Complaint submission shows success then complaint history with status badges
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit a new complaint, see a success confirmation, then switch to complaint history and view status badges.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the bottom navigation item for complaints
Select a complaint category
Fill Test complaint description into the complaint description field
Fill Test location into the location field
Submit the complaint form
Wait for the submitting state to complete
Switch to the my complaints tab
Verify a complaint submission success confirmation is visible
Verify complaint items are listed with status badges

title: Bottom Navigation allows recovery from deep scroll on a page
description: Verifies that after scrolling within a long authenticated page the Bottom Navigation still enables switching to another section.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the Services tab in the bottom navigation
Scroll to the bottom of the services list
Click the Home tab in the bottom navigation
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Notifications list shows unread indicator, type icons, and date stamps
description: Verifies an authenticated user can browse notifications and see unread status, notification type icons, and timestamps.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the bottom navigation item for notifications
Verify an unread indicator is shown for an unread notification
Verify notification type icons and date stamps are displayed

title: Bottom Navigation remains usable during rapid tab switching
description: Verifies that rapidly switching between Bottom Navigation tabs does not break navigation and the final selected destination loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the Notifications tab in the bottom navigation
Click the Complaints tab in the bottom navigation
Click the Services tab in the bottom navigation
Click the Home tab in the bottom navigation
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Proceed from splash screen to login after animation
description: This test verifies that the splash screen completes its animation and the user can proceed to the login page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for 2 seconds
Click the primary call-to-action to proceed
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Property search remains disabled when property ID is empty
description: Verifies the user cannot initiate a property tax search until a property ID is provided and the UI shows the search action as disabled.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the mobile number field
Submit the request to send OTP
Fill 1234 into the OTP field
Submit OTP verification
Click the bottom navigation item for property tax
Verify the property search action is disabled when the property ID field is empty

title: Prevent sending OTP when mobile number is empty
description: This test verifies that the user cannot proceed to request an OTP when the mobile number input is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill  into the mobile number field
Verify the send OTP action is disabled
